name: Chrome Utilities
description: Small collection (market) of small Chrome snippets you can enable/disable from the popup.

action.default_title: Chrome Utilities - open to toggle snippets

collapse-tab-group.description: Collapse the active tab group and move focus to the nearest tab outside it.

detach-current-tab.description: Detach the active tab into a new maximized window.

add-new-tab.description: Create a new tab immediately to the right of the active tab.
